mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE product_code = #{code} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM product WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND status = 'ON_SALE' AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = #{status} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY id ASC
